title: RoboSoc founded
text: Society officially recognised by the Students' Guild.

title: First committee elected
text: Founding committee begins planning the year.

title: Workshop series kicks off
text: Introduction to Robotics, our first ever event. Followed by Arduino and CAD workshops.

title: Line Follower Workshop
text: 30 members built and programmed line-following robots in one session.

title: Mini Sumo Competition announced
text: Build a mini sumo robot and compete head-to-head. Coming this June.
